mnemonics.title: TPE Framework
mnemonics.content: Task, Performance, Experience - the three pillars of Mitchell's learning definition. No learning problem is complete without all three.

mnemonics.title: Induction = Examples to Rules
mnemonics.content: Inductive: see examples -> make rules. Deductive: know rules -> apply to examples. ML is mostly inductive.

mnemonics.title: Rote vs Real
mnemonics.content: Rote = Recall Only Training Examples. Real learning = Generalize to new data.

mnemonics.title: Hypothesis Hunt
mnemonics.content: Learning = searching the Hypothesis space for the best function that maps inputs to outputs. Training data guides the search.

mnemonics.title: ILH = Inductive Learning Hope
mnemonics.content: The Inductive Learning Hypothesis says: what works on training data will work on unseen data, if the training set is representative enough.
